description: Grainy daytime color photograph with a small ICE logo and a button overlay. The photo, apparently shot through a vehicle window, shows several plainclothes officers in body armor making an arrest beside a tan sedan in a residential area with bare trees and brick buildings behind. Visible vest markings include 'ATF POLICE' and 'POLICE'; a man in a white hoodie and jeans is being detained against the car (faces are blurred and pixelated). At lower left is a small white DHS seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark, with a 'LEARN MORE' button and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom.' The added elements are the agency logo and the newsroom URL on the photograph.
notable_text: ICE; LEARN MORE; ICE.gov/newsroom; ATF POLICE / POLICE (apparel markings)
